title: BagulhoCraft
description: A mod focused on making gameplay more practical, accessible and realistic, without breaking the balance of the vanilla game.
body:
**✨ This mod brings a more logical and efficient approach to Minecraft,** enhancing the game's progression with **new mechanics and recipes.** The **crafting** experience becomes more practical and coherent, allowing for item acquisition in a **more intuitive** way and **reducing reliance on luck or time-consuming processes.** 🚀

---

**🔧 Key improvements and additions:**

🌟 **Alternative Recipes and Crafting Improvements**  
It is now possible to **obtain essential items** like **glowstone dust**, **ender pearls**, **flint**, **leather**, and **black dye** through new crafting methods. 🎨

🌱 **Resource Acquisition Enhancement**  
Cows **now drop more meat** 🐄, plants **provide new ingredients** 🍃, and **new cave roots** allow for **wood creation** in underground environments 🌑.

⚙️ **Rebalancing and Efficiency**  
Items like **powered rails** can be crafted with **copper** ⚡, **shapeless recipes** were applied to several items, and **chain crafting** has been optimized for faster processing 🔗.

💎 **New Materials and Processes**  
**Addition of amazing materials** like **white glue**, **weeping obsidian tears**, and **cave roots**, expanding crafting and exploration possibilities. 🛠️

---

**And there’s more to come!** 🔥
